description.value:
Seastone Shackles Item 8

Rare, Seastone

These grey-stone manacles are forged from standard-grade Seastone and lined with iron. They are used by naval forces to restrain captured Devil Fruit users.

Sea-Bound Interaction: A creature with the Sea-Bound trait who is bound in Seastone Shackles immediately triggers their Sea-Bound condition (Slowed 1, Clumsy 1, Devil Fruit abilities suppressed) for as long as they remain shackled.

Escaping: The shackles use the standard Escape rules (PF2E Core). The DC is 25. A creature suppressed by Sea-Bound cannot use any Devil Fruit actions to escape.

Hardness 13 / HP 52 / BT 26
description.gm: These shackles are a primary tool of the World Government. Placing them on a captive requires a successful grapple or the target being willing/helpless. The Sea-Bound condition is applied automatically by the module when the item is in the actor's equipped items.
